sources.name: International Court of Justice (ICJ)
sources.coverage: All ICJ judgments, advisory opinions, orders, pleadings since 1946 + predecessor PCIJ 1922–1946 (~180 cases)
sources.access: No API; scraping. THIRD-PARTY BULK: 'Corpus of Decisions: ICJ' (CD-ICJ) by Fobbe on Zenodo (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.3826444) — ~2,215 EN / 2,197 FR docs, PDF+TXT+CSV, OCR-enhanced, biannual updates, openly licensed. RECOMMENDED.
sources.format: PDF (older scanned); CD-ICJ provides cleaned text
sources.license: ICJ docs are UN public-domain-type; bulk redistribution from ICJ site uncertain — verify

sources.name: International Criminal Court (ICC) + Case Law Database
sources.coverage: All ICC judgments/decisions since 2004; 6,000+ extracted legal findings in CLD (launched March 2021)
sources.access: JavaScript SPA; no public API; headless-browser scraping
sources.license: Public; reuse with attribution — verify bulk terms

sources.name: ICC Legal Tools Database
sources.coverage: 145,000+ documents in 9 collections: ICC materials, ICL treaties, other ICT/ICC-like courts, national implementing legislation, scholarly commentary, HR law decisions, UN war-crimes materials
sources.access: JavaScript SPA; contact CILRAP for bulk
sources.license: Open-access philosophy; per-doc copyrights vary

sources.name: UN Treaty Collection
sources.coverage: ~560+ multilateral treaties; full UNTS (~30k since 1946); LNTS (1920–1944); MTDSG status
sources.access: Search UI only; no API; no bulk downloads officially
sources.license: Individual treaty texts public-domain; DB itself proprietary per shop.un.org — bulk reuse requires permission

sources.name: UN Digital Library
sources.coverage: Bibliographic records since 1979; full-text UN documents; resolutions, voting data
sources.access: OAI-PMH at /oai2d (Dublin Core) — TRUE BULK METADATA ENDPOINT; search-URL scripting also viable
sources.license: UN docs reusable with attribution; bulk harvesting via OAI-PMH explicitly supported

sources.name: UN Official Document System (ODS)
sources.coverage: Full text of all UN official docs since 1993; GA/SC/ECOSOC/Trusteeship resolutions since 1946; 6 UN languages
sources.access: No API; UNDOCS/EZ-Link deep-link by symbol (docs.un.org/{symbol})
sources.license: Public UN docs; reuse with attribution

sources.name: UN Audiovisual Library of International Law
sources.coverage: Historic Archives (treaty negotiation records), Lecture Series (240+ scholars), Research Library
sources.access: Scraping; podcast feed; no API
sources.license: '© United Nations — All Rights Reserved' — stricter than ordinary UN material; reuse constrained

sources.name: International Law Commission
sources.coverage: Annual reports (A/xx/10 since 1949); draft articles + commentaries (State Responsibility, Law of Treaties, Jus Cogens, etc.); special rapporteur reports; yearbooks
sources.access: Direct PDFs; also indexed in ODS + UNDL OAI-PMH
sources.license: UN public docs; reuse with attribution

sources.name: NATO
sources.coverage: NAT treaty + protocols; PfP docs; all ministerial communiqués since 1949; NATO Archives Online (105,000+ declassified docs); NATOTerm
sources.access: Scraping; Archives Online search UI — no API
sources.license: NATO docs reusable for informational purposes; no CC; verify reuse

sources.name: NATO STANAGs (public subset)
sources.coverage: Public index contains ONLY non-classified releasable-to-public STANAGs; most are NATO CLASSIFIED
sources.access: Public DB only; do NOT attempt classified material
sources.license: NATO copyright

sources.name: Wilson Center Digital Archive (incl. CWIHP)
sources.coverage: Warsaw Pact docs (1955–1988) from Russian/Bulgarian/Romanian/Polish archives; Soviet military exercises; diplomatic cables; many with English translations
sources.access: Search UI; registered on re3data.org; no documented public API/bulk; scraping possible
sources.license: Reuse welcomed for research/education; some docs have rights-holder copyrights; commercial reuse needs permission

sources.name: Parallel History Project (PHP) — ETH Zurich
sources.coverage: Formerly: Parallel History Project on NATO and Warsaw Pact, extensive Cold War military docs
sources.access: EFFECTIVELY DEFUNCT — server returns 'not available' notice; some content via Wayback Machine or migrated to Wilson Center
sources.license: N/A

sources.name: ICRC IHL Databases
sources.coverage: (1) IHL Treaties + Commentaries (Geneva Conventions, APs, all IHL instruments, updated commentaries); (2) Customary IHL Study (Henckaerts & Doswald-Beck); (3) National Implementation
sources.access: JavaScript SPA; no documented API; headless-browser scraping required
sources.license: ICRC copyright; citation with attribution permitted; bulk/commercial reuse requires ICRC permission

sources.name: WTO Dispute Settlement
sources.coverage: All WTO disputes since 1995 (DS1+); 631+ requests, 350+ rulings by end-2024; Analytical Index; AB Repertory
sources.access: Search UI on wto.org; no public API. Curated 1995–2016 dataset from EUI (Johannesson & Mavroidis) at globalgovernanceprogramme.eui.eu/wto-case-law-project
sources.license: WTO Secretariat materials; reuse with attribution for informational purposes

sources.name: ITLOS
sources.coverage: All ITLOS cases + advisory opinions since 1997
sources.access: Scraping only; /en/main/cases/list-of-cases/case-no-N/
sources.license: RESTRICTIVE — explicit non-commercial clause; redistribution/translation requires Registrar's written permission

sources.name: Permanent Court of Arbitration (PCA)
sources.coverage: Inter-state, investor-State, commercial, maritime/boundary cases; cases public only with party consent
sources.access: Scraping; no API
sources.license: PCA © 2026 all rights reserved — reuse by permission

sources.name: WIPO Lex
sources.coverage: 50,000+ documents from 200 jurisdictions; IP laws, treaties, IP judgments from 18+ states; 6 UN languages
sources.access: Search UI; WIPO API Catalog for IP launched Sep 2024 at wipo.int/en/web/standards/ip-api-catalog — dedicated WIPO Lex bulk API uncertain — verify
sources.license: CC BY 3.0 IGO for many WIPO works; national laws are state works

sources.name: Inter-American Court of Human Rights (IACtHR)
sources.coverage: All merits/reparations judgments, provisional measures, advisory opinions, compliance orders
sources.access: Official site has cookies/security wall; no API. Third-party: SUMMA (summa.cejil.org) by CEJIL/HURIDOCS — free, 3 langs; Loyola Law School IACHR Project (iachr.lls.edu, 273+ summaries).
sources.license: Official judgments public; SUMMA is open

sources.name: African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights
sources.coverage: Judgments, procedural decisions, orders, provisional measures, advisory opinions since 2009
sources.access: Court DB (no keyword full-text); third-party IHRDA analyzer last updated 2017; scraping required
sources.license: Public; terms not explicit — verify

sources.name: ICSID
sources.coverage: All ICSID-registered cases since 1972; ICSID/Additional Facility/UNCITRAL rules
sources.access: Searchable DB; no API/bulk of decisions; Caseload-Statistics semi-annual
sources.license: Decisions public when authorized; reuse with attribution

sources.name: UNCTAD ISDS Navigator
sources.coverage: 1,440 investor-State arbitration cases (as of 31 July 2025)
sources.access: FULL EXCEL RELEASE, free — near-ideal structured bulk
sources.license: Free reuse with citation

sources.name: JusMundi
sources.coverage: Arbitration awards, treaties, Wiki Notes, CiteMap, commentary
sources.access: Freemium; ToS prohibit bulk; no public API
sources.license: Proprietary — EXCLUDE for open RAG

sources.name: Max Planck Encyclopedias of International Law (MPEPIL/MPEiPro)
sources.coverage: 1,700+ peer-reviewed entries across all public international law; MPEiPro merged into MPEPIL on 1 Jan 2024
sources.access: Since April 2025, open-access via Subscribe-to-Open; browsable/downloadable per entry; no bulk API
sources.license: Open-access (S2O) — verify per-entry CC variant

sources.name: ICTY / ICTR / IRMCT
sources.coverage: All public records; Case Law Database ~1,800 entries of Appeals jurisprudence; Unified Court Records (email registration required)
sources.access: Search UI; no API; scraping feasible
sources.license: UN docs; reuse with attribution
